name: MSC INDUSTRIAL DIRECT CO INC
summary: . General MSC is a leading North American distributor of a broad range of metalworking and maintenance, repair and operations (MRO) products and services. With a history of driving innovation in industrial product distribution for more than 80 years, we help solve our manufacturing customers metalworking and MRO challenges.
